entries.name: join command
entries.description: The join command truncates subsearch results at 50K events with a 60s timeout and is a common source of silent data loss in catalogue SPL.
entries.remediation: Replace join with OR + conditional stats, lookup, or subsearch-free correlation patterns documented in splunk-conf-and-spl.mdc.

entries.name: makeresults in catalogue SPL
entries.description: makeresults fabricates inline events instead of querying real indexes. Acceptable in dashboard JSON for empty-state demos but not in UC sidecar SPL that must run against live data.
entries.remediation: Query a real index/sourcetype pair (or tstats/datamodel) so the search returns zero rows when no data exists rather than fake values.

entries.name: random() placeholder values
entries.description: random() produces unstable values on every refresh and masks missing data instead of surfacing empty results.
entries.remediation: Remove random(); use fixed demo constants only in simulators, never in catalogue SPL.

entries.name: coalesce hardcoded numeric fallback
entries.description: coalesce(field, 87.3) embeds demo data in SPL. When the field is null the panel shows a plausible but fabricated number.
entries.remediation: Use coalesce(field, 0) or omit the fallback; let empty results propagate.

entries.name: search after stats
entries.description: Using search after stats redistributes aggregated results to indexers. where runs locally on the search head and is cheaper.
entries.remediation: Replace '| search count>0' (or similar) with '| where count>0' after stats.

entries.name: leading wildcard term
entries.description: Leading wildcards (*foo) prevent index-time term pruning and force full bucket scans.
entries.remediation: Anchor the literal prefix (foo*) or use field=value with a trailing wildcard only.

entries.name: oversized lookback earliest=0
entries.description: earliest=0 scans from the Unix epoch and is almost never intentional in monitoring searches.
entries.remediation: Use a bounded relative window (-24h, -7d) or an explicit ISO timestamp aligned to the use case.

entries.name: missing index filter
entries.description: Catalogue SPL should anchor on index= (or tstats/datamodel/inputlookup) so reviewers know which bucket the search targets.
entries.remediation: Add index=<name> to the base search or document why a generating command replaces it.

entries.name: missing sourcetype filter
entries.description: When index= is present, sourcetype= (or an equivalent field constraint) narrows the scan and documents the expected wire format.
entries.remediation: Add sourcetype=<name> alongside index= unless tstats/datamodel already scopes the dataset.

entries.name: multi-pipe single line
entries.description: Every pipe stage must start its own physical line. One-liners are hard to review and hide anti-patterns.
entries.remediation: Reformat so the base search is line 1 and each | stage begins a new line.

entries.name: transaction without bounds
entries.description: Unbounded transaction commands accumulate unbounded memory and can stall search heads on busy indexes.
entries.remediation: Add maxspan=, maxpause=, or maxevents= limits appropriate to the correlation window.

entries.name: streamstats over unbounded data
entries.description: streamstats without time_window= or window= retains state for the entire result set and can exhaust memory.
entries.remediation: Add time_window= or window=, or pre-filter/limit events before streamstats.
